compiled_state.title: RED: Create merge-state library test suite (10 tests)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh with 10 behavioral tests for the shared library API.

Test isolation: Each test creates a temp git repo via mktemp -d && git init. MERGE_HEAD/REBASE_HEAD files written directly into temp .git/. Tests use _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR env var override.

Tests:
1. test_is_merge_in_progress_detects_merge_head
2. test_is_merge_in_progress_returns_false_when_no_merge
3. test_is_rebase_in_progress_detects_rebase_head
4. test_is_rebase_in_progress_detects_rebase_apply
5. test_get_worktree_only_files_filters_incoming_during_merge
6. test_get_worktree_only_files_filters_during_rebase
7. test_merge_head_equals_head_guard_skips_filtering
8. test_fallback_on_missing_merge_base_orig_head (fail-open: returns original list)
9. test_fallback_on_missing_merge_base_head (fail-open: returns original list for HEAD variant)
10. test_get_worktree_only_files_from_head_during_rebase

TDD: Tests must fail (RED) before Task 2 implements the library.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh exists with 10 test functions
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh && grep -c "^test_" tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry maps merge-state.sh to test file
  Verify: grep -q "merge-state.sh" .test-index
- [ ] All 10 tests fail (RED) when library does not exist
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh; test $? -ne 0

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Add 2 tests for ms_get_merge_base (merge + rebase). Total: 12 tests. Update verify threshold to 12.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — test framework uses assert.sh helpers, temp git repos via mktemp -d/git init. Library will be at plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh with functions: ms_is_merge_in_progress, ms_is_rebase_in_progress, ms_get_worktree_only_files, ms_get_merge_base. Tests use _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR env var override for isolation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh created with 12 test functions (10 original + 2 for ms_get_merge_base per AC amendment). .test-index entry added with RED marker.
